tagline: Fresh Cold-Pressed Goodness, Delivered to Your Doorstep

sections.name: Hero
sections.copy: Welcome to G-Celeb Cakes Juice & Smoothie Co – Where Health Meets Flavour in Every Sip. Experience the finest cold-pressed juices, wholesome smoothies, and delicious cakes crafted with love in Ughelli, Delta State. Fresh ingredients, zero preservatives, pure Nigerian goodness. Order now and taste the difference!
sections.imagePrompt: Vibrant Nigerian juice bar counter with fresh tropical fruits including oranges, watermelon, pineapple, and carrots arranged beautifully, colorful cold-pressed juice bottles in glass containers, modern blender, warm morning sunlight streaming through windows, inviting atmosphere, photorealistic, high quality, warm tones

sections.name: About Us
sections.copy: G-Celeb Cakes Juice & Smoothie Co (also known as G-Celeb Cakes Cold-Press Beverages Limited) is Ughelli's premier FoodTech destination for health-conscious Nigerians who refuse to compromise on taste. Founded by an Aquaculture Tech innovator with a passion for wellness, we combine technology with traditional Nigerian flavours to bring you cold-pressed juices, nutrient-packed smoothies, and freshly baked cakes that fuel your body and delight your senses. From our home in Ughelli North, Delta State, we're revolutionizing how Nigerians enjoy healthy beverages – one fresh bottle at a time.
sections.imagePrompt: Modern Nigerian food preparation facility with stainless steel cold-press juice machines, young Nigerian entrepreneur in chef's whites inspecting fresh produce, shelves of bottled colorful juices, clean hygienic environment, natural lighting, professional food tech setup, photorealistic

sections.name: Our Offerings
sections.copy:
Cold-Pressed Juices: Pure, unpasteurized juices extracted using hydraulic press technology to preserve maximum nutrients. Choose from Orange Sunrise, Watermelon Refresh, Carrot Glow, and seasonal Nigerian fruit blends.

Signature Smoothies: Creamy, protein-rich smoothies made with fresh fruits, yogurt, and natural sweeteners. Perfect for breakfast or post-workout recovery.

Fresh Cakes: Moist, delicious cakes baked daily for celebrations, corporate events, or simply treating yourself. Custom orders available.

Bulk Orders & Subscriptions: Weekly juice deliveries for offices, gyms, and health-conscious families across Ughelli and beyond.

All products made fresh to order. No artificial preservatives. No added sugar unless requested. Just pure, wholesome Nigerian goodness.
sections.imagePrompt: Grid layout showcase of Nigerian juice and smoothie products: colorful cold-pressed juice bottles labeled with Nigerian fruits, smoothie bowls topped with fresh fruit, elegant cake slices on wooden boards, all arranged on rustic Nigerian wooden table with tropical leaves decoration, bright natural lighting, professional food photography

sections.name: Get In Touch
sections.copy:
Ready to experience the freshest cold-pressed beverages in Ughelli? We're here to serve you!

Visit Us: Flat 85 NEPA Estate Ighwre Ovie, Ughelli, Delta State

Call or WhatsApp: 08152733977 / 07047945340

Email: info@gcelebcakes.com

Opening Hours: Monday - Saturday, 8:00 AM - 7:00 PM

We deliver across Ughelli North and surrounding communities. Bulk orders for events, offices, and gyms welcome. Same-day delivery available for orders placed before 2:00 PM.

Follow us on social media for daily specials, wellness tips, and exclusive promotions. Your health journey starts with one delicious sip – order today!

sections.name: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.copy:
How long do your cold-pressed juices last?
Our juices are fresh and preservative-free, lasting 3-5 days when refrigerated. We recommend consuming within 72 hours for optimal taste and nutrition.

Do you deliver outside Ughelli?
Yes! We deliver across Ughelli North, Ughelli South, and surrounding Delta State communities. Contact us for delivery availability in your area.

Can I customize my smoothie or juice blend?
Absolutely! We love creating custom blends. Call or WhatsApp us with your preferred fruits and we'll craft something special for you.

Are your products suitable for diabetics?
Our cold-pressed juices contain natural fruit sugars. We offer low-sugar options using vegetables and can prepare sugar-free smoothies on request. Please consult your healthcare provider.

What's your minimum order for bulk/corporate orders?
Minimum 20 bottles for corporate deliveries. We offer attractive discounts for weekly subscriptions and large events.

Do you cater for events?
Yes! We provide juice bars, smoothie stations, and fresh cakes for weddings, birthdays, corporate functions, and other celebrations across Delta State.
